name: libp2p Mesh Network
description: P2P network for cross-instance agent communication via libp2p.

enableWebSocket.description: Enable WebSocket transport (useful for browser compatibility)

enableDHT.description: Enable DHT for WAN peer discovery and pubkey registry.

instanceName.description: Custom name for this OpenClaw instance (used in InstanceID). Defaults to "<username>-<hostname>".

enableNATTraversal.description: Master switch for the NAT traversal stack (identify + AutoNAT + UPnP + Circuit Relay v2 + DCUtR).

enableIdentify.description: Run the libp2p identify protocol; required by AutoNAT and DCUtR.

enableAutoNAT.description: Use AutoNAT to learn whether this node is publicly reachable.

enableUPnP.description: Attempt UPnP/PMP port mapping on the local gateway.

enableCircuitRelay.description: Dial peers via /p2p-circuit relay addresses; reserve a slot on each entry in relayList.

enableCircuitRelayServer.description: Act as a Circuit Relay v2 server. Only enable on a publicly reachable node.

enableDCUtR.description: Direct Connection Upgrade through Relay (hole punching).

relayList.description: Multiaddrs of relays to reserve a slot on (each entry must end in /p2p/<peer-id>).

discoverRelays.description: Auto-discover this many relays via content routing. Requires DHT.

announceAddrs.description: Extra multiaddrs to announce to the network on top of auto-detected ones.

discovery.label: Discovery Mechanism
discovery.help: Peer discovery: mdns (LAN), bootstrap (static list), or dht (Kademlia).

bootstrapList.label: Bootstrap Peers
bootstrapList.help: Static bootstrap peer multiaddrs when discovery=bootstrap.

meshTopic.label: Mesh Topic
meshTopic.help: Default topic used for P2P broadcasts.
